narrative:
Hamilton Twp V (precinct in Warren County) has 1,248 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
